description: Configures DNS records required to point a custom domain to a Coreware-hosted website. This template sets a subdomain CNAME record and the domain ownership verification TXT record needed to activate and verify a custom domain on the Coreware website builder.
variableDescription: cnameHost: The subdomain label the CNAME record is placed on (e.g. www, blog, shop). cnameDomain: The FQDN the CNAME record should point to (Coreware website CNAME target). verificationToken: The unique domain ownership verification token assigned to this website domain (e.g. cw-verify-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx).
